hub.title: Creators & Wallpaper Hub
hub.description: Codelume focuses on developing and maintaining the dynamic wallpaper engine, and also offers a curated selection of wallpapers. Creators are welcome to submit work by email—accepted pieces are shown in Wallpaper Hub.

formats.title: Formats we align on
formats.description: Prefer .bundle wallpaper packs exported from Codelume Studio—they make it easy to share your work's details and for Codelume to load them.

community.title: Where we stay in sync
community.description: New wallpapers, releases, and technical notes mainly go out on Douyin—the easiest place to follow the product rhythm and send feedback.

rights.title: Rights & mutual trust
rights.description: We attribute public materials where we can—that is part of how we work with creators and rights holders. If you see an issue, email us with details and we will review and reply.
